name: Kolochy/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Mix the butter and cream cheese with a mixer or in a food processor until well combined, taking care not to overprocess.
3. Add the flour and mix just until combined.
4. Chill dough for 30 minutes.
5. Roll out the dough very thin on a floured board or pastry cloth.
6. Cut into 2-inch rounds with a cookie cutter.
7. Dot the center of each round with 1/4 teaspoon of jam or jelly.
8. Fold two opposite edges to the center and press firmly together.
9. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Bake for 15 minutes.
11. Transfer pastries to wax paper generously dusted with confectioners' sugar and sift more sugar over the kolachy while they are still hot.
Yield: 30 to 40 pieces
